title: Jiho Min
text:
I am Jiho Min, a South Korean-American middle school student passionate about technology, finance, and creating meaningful digital experiences. I love building things with code, exploring the world of stock investing and economics, and continuously expanding my knowledge across diverse fields.
Beyond coding, I actively contribute as a translator for various international websites, bridging language barriers and making content accessible to wider audiences. I believe in the power of technology to solve real-world problems and am always eager to learn new skills and take on challenging projects.

 🚀 Visit My Blog!

title: Jiho Min
text:
🎯 Featured Projects

⚽ Seocho Middle School Soccer Club Website
A comprehensive website for the Seocho Middle School soccer team, built entirely as a solo project. The platform provides team information, match schedules, player profiles, and performance statistics.
Tech Stack: Python, Streamlit, Pandas, Plotly

GitHub Repository: github.com/jiho-m0521/seochofc
Live Demo: seochofc.streamlit.app

This project showcases my ability to build full-featured web applications using modern Python frameworks, with a focus on data visualization and user experience.
